card.name: Yuta, Jujutsu Duplicator
card.text: Technique - {4}{u}, {t}: Copy up to two target activated abilities. You may choose new targets for the copies. (Whenever Yuta attacks, you can activate his technique once for free. Mana abilities can't be targeted.)

card.name: Multani, Maro-Sorcerer (Hanami, Maro-Sorcerer)
card.text: Shroud (This creature can't be the target of spells or abilities.) Hanami's power and toughness are each equal to the total number of cards in all players' hands.

card.name: Training Grounds
card.text: Activated abilities of creatures you control cost {2} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana.

card.name: Higuruma, Unwilling Judge
card.text: Ward {2} Technique - {wb}, {t}: Choose target creature. If its controller has committed a crime this turn, destroy it. Otherwise, it loses all abilities until end of turn. (Whenever Higuruma attacks, you can activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Flawless Maneuver
card.text: If you control a commander, you may cast this spell without paying its mana cost. Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Horizon of the Captivating Skandha
card.text: (As this enters, put all other worlds into their owners' graveyards.) At the beginning of your end step, create a 0/0 blue Spirit Fish creature token with X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the number of Spirits, Krakens, Leviathans, Octopuses, and Serpents you control. When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, tap each creature you don't control.

card.name: Vengeful Possession
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. You may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Principal Yaga, Puppetcrafter
card.text: Technique — {1}{w}: Create a 1/1 red Spirit Toy artifact creature token that's tapped and attacking. Activate only while Yaga is attacking. (Whenever Yaga attacks, you can activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Deadly Sentencing
card.text: (As this enters, put all other worlds into their owners' graveyards.) When this enchantment enters, exile target creature until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, destroy target creature.

card.name: Unstoppable Onslaught
card.text: This spell deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker. Cursed - If there are four or more Sorcerer cards in your graveyard, the damage can't be prevented and that permanent loses indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Demonfire
card.text: Demonfire deals X damage to any target. If a creature dealt damage this way would die this turn, exile it instead. Hellbent — If you have no cards in hand, this spell can't be countered and the damage can't be prevented.

card.name: Kokichi Muta, Empowered
card.text: Fabricate 2 Kokichi's power is equal to the number of artifacts you control. {b}, Pay X life: Put X +1/+1 counters on target noncreature artifact. It becomes a 0/0 Robot artifact creature with vigilance and trample. X can't be zero and can't be more than Kokichi's power.

card.name: Rika
card.text: Flying Trample

card.name: Ultimate Mechamaru, Mode: Absolute
card.text: Trample, Modular 4 Remove a +1/+1 counter from Ultimate Mechamaru: It gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Crew 3

card.name: Suguru Geto, Curse Catcher
card.text: Technique — {x}{g}{w}: Create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with X +1/+1 counters on it. (Whenever Geto attacks, you may activate one of his techniques once for free. X is zero when you do.) Technique — {3}{b}{g}: Spirits you control gain lifelink, trample, and haste until end of turn. Untap them.

card.name: Test of Certainty
card.text: What's your type? - Choose a creature type. Each player secretly chooses a creature you control of that type, then those choices are revealed. The creature you chose deals damage equal to its power to each player that chose another creature.

card.name: Aoi Todo, Musclebound Tutor
Kasumi Miwa, New-Shadow Novice
card.text: First strike, vigilance

card.name: Gisela, Blade of Goldnight (Gojo, the Honored One)
card.text: Flying, First strike If a source would deal damage to an opponent or a permanent an opponent controls, that source deals double that damage to that player or permanent instead. If a source would deal damage to you or a permanent you control, prevent half that damage, rounded up.

card.name: Infinite Void
card.text: (As this enters, put all other worlds into their owners' graveyards.) If an opponent would draw a card, they instead draw twenty cards. Sacrifice this enchantment: You may draw up to five cards.

card.name: Reggie Star, Re-Creator
card.text: Technique - {u}{b}: Exile target noncreature card from a graveyard and copy it. You may cast the copy this turn, and mana of any type may be used to cast it. (Whenever Reggie attacks, you may activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Lightning Bolt
card.text: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Predators’ Hour
card.text: Until end of turn, creatures you control gain menace and “Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, exile the top card of that player's library face down. You may look at and play that card for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast that spell.”

card.name: Choso, Death Painting
card.text: Technique - {2}{B}: Create a Blood token. (Whenever Choso attacks, you can activate his technique once for free.) {r}, Sacrifice X Bloods: Choso deals X damage to up to X targets.

card.name: Miguel and The Black Rope
card.text: Vigilance Technique - {2}{w}: Until end of turn, target creature loses all abilities. (Whenever Miguel attacks, you may activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

card.name: Seal Away
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, exile target tapped creature an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Nanako, Picture Perfect
card.text: Technique - {2}{w}: Create an enchantment token with target creature's name. (Whenever Nanako attacks, you may activate her technique once for free.) {u}, {t}, Sacrifice a token: Counter target spell that targets a permanent with the same name as the sacrificed token. Partner with Mimiko, Dollslayer

card.name: Renewed Solidarity
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type. Creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+0. At the beginning of your end step, for each token you control of the chosen type that entered this turn, create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Naoya Zen’in, Unstoppable
card.text: First strike, haste Technique - {1}{w}{r}: Naoya gets +2/-2 until end of turn. Untap him. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. Only creatures with haste can attack during that phase. Activate only during combat on your turn.

card.name: Gift of the Viper
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter, a reach counter, and a deathtouch counter on target creature. Untap it.

card.name: Great Teacher Gojo
card.text: Flash Flying, hexproof, indestructible, prowess, haste, mentor

card.name: Agatha’s Soul Cauldron (Yuta’s Cursed Ring)
card.text: You may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to activate abilities of creatures you control. Creatures you control with +1/+1 counters on them have all activated abilities of all creature cards exiled with ~. {T}: Exile target card from a graveyard. When a creature card is exiled this way, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Rakdos Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target player's graveyard. • Destroy target artifact. • Each creature deals 1 damage to its controller.

card.name: Mai Zen’in, Reluctant Recruit
card.text: Vigilance, reach Exhaust - Outlast ({t}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Mai. Activate only as a sorcery, and only activate once.)

card.name: Miwa, Quick-Draw Striker
card.text: Technique - {w}{u}: Untap Miwa. She gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. (Whenever this creature attacks, you can activate its technique once for free.)

card.name: Todo and Yuji, Brothers
card.text: Double strike, vigilance, trample {2}, {t}: Switch two target creatures. (They exchange what they're being targeted by, blocked by, attacking, and/or blocking. This doesn't trigger attacking or blocking effects.)

card.name: Dhruv Lakwadwalla, The Ancient
card.text: Vigilance Technique - {X}{2}{g}: Create a 1/1 green and blue Spirit creature token. When you do, put X +1/+1 counters on target Spirit token. If X is 0, put a flying counter on it instead. (Whenever Dhruv attacks, you may activate his technique once for free. If you do so, X is 0.)

card.name: Megumi Fushiguro, First Year
card.text: Menace Mobilize 2 (Whenever this creature attacks, create 2 tapped and attacking 1/1 red Warrior creature tokens. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.)

card.name: Dagon, Ocean’s Ire
card.text: Technique - {3}{u}{u}: Create one of each of the following three blue creature tokens. • A 1/1 Spirit Fish with flying. • A 3/3 Spirit Serpent with vigilance. • A tapped 6/6 Spirit Kraken with trample and fading 1.

card.name: Playful Cloud
card.text: If equipped creature would deal combat damage, it deals double that damage instead. Equip {2}

card.name: Standstill
card.text: When a player casts a spell, sacrifice this enchantment. If you do, each of that player's opponents draws three cards.

card.name: Momo Nishimiya, Third Year
card.text: Flying, vigilance

card.name: Bloodthirster
card.text: Flying, trample Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, untap it. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. This creature can't attack a player it has already attacked this turn.

card.name: Greed
card.text: {B}, Pay 2 life: Draw a card.

card.name: Biomancer’s Familiar
card.text: Activated abilities of creatures you control cost {2} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana. {T}: The next time target creature adapts this turn, it adapts as though it had no +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Reggie Star, Con Artist
card.text: Instant and sorcery spells you cast have “Buyback—{1}, Sacrifice an artifact.” (You may pay a spell's buyback cost as you cast it. If you do, put it into its owner's hand instead of into a graveyard as it resolves.) Whenever you buyback a spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Reggie.

card.name: Spirit Body of Distorted Killing
card.text: Enchant Creature At the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice a creature unless you control ten or more Spirits. Enchanted creature gets +3/+3 and has menace, trample, and “Ward—Pay life equal to this creature's power.”

card.name: Coffin of the Iron Mountain
card.text: (As this enters, put all other worlds into their owners' graveyards.) Double all damage that sources you control would deal. When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, it deals 5 damage to any target.

card.name: Preternatural Efficiency
card.text: Activated abilities of creatures you control cost {2} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana. If a creature attacking causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Aoi Todo, Master Baiter
card.text: Haste Technique - {2}{2r}{2w}: The next time target creature would deal damage this turn, it instead deals that damage to any target you choose. (Whenever Todo attacks, you can activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Spirit Bird
card.text: Flying

card.name: Gate of the Prison Realm
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {1}{w}, {t}: Choose a tapped creature you don't control. Exile it until this artifact leaves the battlefield or another creature is exiled this way. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Festering Life Sword
Split Soul Katana
card.text: Equipped creature gets +3/+3, has deathtouch and menace, and has “Whenever this creature attacks, exile target permanent defending player controls.” Equip {4}

card.name: Titan of Littjara
card.text: As this creature enters, choose a creature type. This creature is the chosen type in addition to its other types. Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may draw a card for each other creature you control that shares a creature type with it. If you do, discard a card.

card.name: Bird
card.text: Flying

card.name: Truth and Power
card.text: Play with your hand revealed. Cards in your hand have flash. Creatures you control have haste.

card.name: Mahoraga, Eight-Handled Sword
card.text: Trample {x}{g}: Adapt X. (If this creature has no +1/+1 counters on it, put X +1/+1 counters on it.) Persist (When this creature dies, if it had no -1/-1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a -1/-1 counter on it. If a permanent has a +1/+1 counter and a -1/-1 counter on it, remove both.)

card.name: Maki, Heavenly Force
card.text: First strike, vigilance, trample, haste, hexproof from Sorcerers and Spirits Damage that would be dealt by Maki can't be prevented. Creatures dealt damage by Maki this turn lose hexproof, indestructible, and protection.

card.name: Kindred Discovery
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type. Whenever a creature you control of the chosen type enters or attacks, draw a card.

card.name: Jujutsu Tech, Tokyo’s Bastion
card.text: This land can be your commander. (It can be played from the command zone if you pay its commander tax.) {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a Samurai, Sorcerer, or Spirit spell, or to activate an ability. {w}{ug}{br}, {t}: Samurai, Sorcerers, and Spirits you control gain melee until end of turn.

card.name: Kirara of the Southern Cross
card.text: Kirara enters with 5 star counters on them. Technique — {1}{w}: Move a star counter from a creature or player you choose to target creature or player. (Whenever Kirara attacks, you can activate their technique once for free.) Creatures and players with star counters on them have protection from other creatures with star counters on them.

card.name: Self-Embodiment of Perfection
card.text: (As this enters, put all other worlds into their owners' graveyards.) Creatures you control get +1/+1 and have deathtouch and menace. When this enchantment is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, destroy all non-Spirit creatures.

card.name: Takuma Ino, Beastial Medium
card.text: Technique - {g}{w}: Ino gains your choice of double strike, hexproof, indestructible, or trample until end of turn. Then if he has all four, he gets +2/+2 until end of turn. (Whenever Ino attacks, you may activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Chain of a Thousand Miles
Simple Domain: Quickdraw
card.text: (As this enters, put all other worlds into their owners' graveyards.) Enchant creature Enchanted creature has hexproof. {2}, Sacrifice this Aura: Enchanted creature gets +3/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Swords to Plowshares
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.

card.name: Unnatural Overcoming
card.text: Target creature you control gains deathtouch, hexproof, and indestructible until end of turn. Cursed - If there are four or more Sorcerer cards in your graveyard, the next time damage would be dealt to that creature this turn, prevent that damage and put that many +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Takaba, Legendary Comedian
card.text: As Takaba enters, tell up to three jokes. For each person that laughs at any, put two +1/+1 counters on Takaba. He gains protection from those who laughed. (Snorts, nostril exhales, and sarcastic ha-ha's are laughs. Non-players laughing counts; comedy is for everyone)

card.name: Raise the Palisade
card.text: Choose a creature type. Return all creatures that aren't of the chosen type to their owners' hands.

card.name: Kindred Summons
card.text: Choose a creature type. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal X creature cards of the chosen type, where X is the number of creatures you control of that type. Put those cards onto the battlefield, then shuffle the rest of the revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Fell
card.text: Destroy target creature.

card.name: Blessing of the Six Eyes
card.text: You have no maximum hand size and don't lose the game for drawing from an empty library. If an opponent would draw a card, you may draw a card. You may look at your opponents' hands at any time.

card.name: Toji and Inventory Spirit
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for an Equipment card, put it into the battlefield attached to this creature, then shuffle. Double strike

card.name: Mai, Burdened Twin
Blood
card.text: {1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.

card.name: Spirit Dog
card.text: Vigilance

card.name: Swiftfoot Boots
card.text: Equipped creature has hexproof and haste. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control. It can attack and {T} no matter when it came under your control.) Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Uro Takako, Wreathed in Sky
card.text: Flying, haste Technique - {3}{u}: Put a shield counter on target permanent. (Whenever Uro attacks, you may activate one of her techniques once for free.) Technique - {1}: Exile target permanent that has a shield counter on it until the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Geto, Sorcerer Supremacist
card.text: Spirits you control are Sorcerers in addition to their other types. Non-Sorcerers are Monkeys. Monkeys enter tapped with a -1/-1 counter on them.

card.name: Black Flash
Shoko Ieiri, Medic
card.text: Technique - {t}: Remove any number of counters from target creature you control. (Whenever Shoko attacks, you may activate one of her techmiques once without paying its costs.) Technique - {t}: Target creature gains persist until end of turn. (When it dies this turn, if it had no - 1/-1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a -1/-1 counter on it.)

card.name: Divine General Mahoraga
card.text: Protection from colorless At the beginning of each end step, for each color among sources that targeted or dealt damage to Mahoraga this turn, put two +1/+1 counters on Mahoraga and Mahoraga gains protection from that color.

card.name: Ryu Ishigori, Disaster Blaster
card.text: Vigilance, reach Technique - {1}{r}{r}: Ryu gets +1/+0 until end of turn, then deals damage equal to his power to any target. (Whenever Ryu attacks, you may activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Chimera Shadow Garden
card.text: (As this enters, put all other worlds into their owners' graveyards.) {u}, Pay X life: Exile target creature or artifact you control with mana value X until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's black and has haste. Activate only once each turn. (A copy has the same mana value as what it copies. Exiled tokens disappear.)

card.name: Resurrect the Soul
card.text: Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Cursed - If there are four or more Sorcerer cards in your graveyard, up to one target creature you control becomes a copy of that card until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Bestie Beatdown
card.text: Two target creatures you control each deal damage equal to their power to target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Toge Inumaki, Second Year
card.text: First strike, deathtouch, reach

card.name: Sibling Rivalry
card.text: Gain control of target artifact or creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. Create a tapped Powerstone token. (It's an artifact with “{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast a nonartifact spell.”)

card.name: Mei Mei, Brazen Manipulator
card.text: Extort Technique - {3}: Create a 1/1 black Bird creature token with flying. (Whenever Mei Mei attacks, you can activate her technique once for free.) {t}, Sacrifice a Bird: Destroy target creature.

card.name: Noritoshi Kamo, Clan Leader
card.text: Reach Renown 1 (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, if it isn't renowned, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes renowned.) Persist

card.name: Hanami, Nature’s Wrath
card.text: Lands and Elementals you control have vigilance, trample, and reach. Technique - {2}{g}{g}: Earthbend 3. (Whenever Hanami attacks, you can activate her technique once for free)

card.name: Naobito Zen’in, Freeze Frame
card.text: First strike, haste Whenever Naobito deals combat damage to a creature, tap that creature and put a stun counter on it. Prevent all damage that would be dealt by creatures with stun counters on them.

card.name: Calculated Strike
card.text: Cursed - If there are four or more Sorcerer cards in your graveyard, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand. If target player controls an odd number of creatures, exile up to one target tapped creature they control. Otherwise, draw two cards.

card.name: Deflecting Palm
card.text: The next time a source of your choice would deal damage to you this turn, prevent that damage. If damage is prevented this way, Deflecting Palm deals that much damage to that source's controller.

card.name: Domain Clash
card.text: Each player may search their library for a world card and put it onto the battlefield. (Multiple worlds entering at the same time all leave the battlefield immediately.)

card.name: Nobara Kugisaki, Reckless Student
card.text: Reach Wither (This deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.)

card.name: Yuta Okkotsu
card.text: Haste Technique — {4}: Create Rika, a legendary 8/8 red and green Spirit creature token with flying and trample. If a creature would deal damage to Yuta and you control a creature named Rika, instead remove Rika from combat and she fights that creature.

card.name: Unrestrained by Heaven
card.text: Create a 3/3 Human Samurai creature token with trample and haste. You may attach up to one Equipment you control to it. Cursed - If there are four or more Sorcerer cards in your graveyard, put an indestructible counter and three +1/+1 counters on that creature.

card.name: Trailblazer’s Boots
card.text: Equipped creature has nonbasic landwalk. Equip {2}

card.name: Cleansing Exorcism
card.text: Cursed - Choose two. If there are four or more Sorcerer cards in your graveyard, instead you may choose any number — • Exile target Spirit. • Exile target enchantment. • Exile target player's graveyard. • Exile target kindred permanent.

card.name: Roaming Throne
card.text: Ward {2} As this creature enters, choose a creature type. This creature is the chosen type in addition to its other types. If a triggered ability of another creature you control of the chosen type triggers, it triggers an additional time.

card.name: Kenjaku, Usurper of Flesh
card.text: Technique - {1}{U}{B}: Exile target creature card from a graveyard. This creature becomes a copy of that card, except it's a Sorcerer in addition to other types and has this ability as a technique ability. (Whenever this creature attacks, you can activate one of its technique abilities for free.)

card.name: Aggravated Assault
card.text: {3}{R}{R}: Untap all creatures you control. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Hanami, Nature’s Wrath Alt
card.text: Lands and Elementals you control have vigilance, trample, and reach. Technique - {2}{g}{g}: Earthbend 3. (Whenever Hanami attacks, you can activate her technique once for free)

card.name: Maki, Jujutsu Tech’s Outlier
card.text: Menace Bushido 2 (Whenever Maki blocks or becomes blocked, she gets +2/+2 until end of turn.)

card.name: Rally the Ranks
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type. Creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1.

card.name: Blasphemous Act
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature on the battlefield. Blasphemous Act deals 13 damage to each creature.

card.name: Spirit Frog
card.text: Reach

card.name: Principal Gakuganji, Old Mettle
card.text: Technique - {w}{b}: Move any number of counters from target creature you control to Gakuganji. (Whenever Gakuganji attacks, you may activate his technique once for free.) Whenever you cast a creature spell, it gains amplify 1. (As it enters, put a +1/+1 counter on it for each card you reveal from your hand that shares a creature type with it.)

card.name: Yuji Itadori, Fledgling Sorcerer
card.text: Double strike

card.name: Toji Fushiguro, Sorcerer Killer
card.text: Fear (Toji can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or black creatures.) Protection from non-colorless Sorcerers, Shamans, and Spirits

card.name: Austere Command
card.text: Choose two — • Destroy all artifacts. • Destroy all enchantments. • Destroy all creatures with mana value 3 or less. • Destroy all creatures with mana value 4 or greater.

card.name: Megumi, Shadow Summoner
card.text: Sacrifice a Spirit: Add {c} equal to its power. {t}, Choose one and pay the cost associated with that mode: Create a creature token with those characteristics. • Gama - {1} — 1/1 green Spirit Frog. • Nue - {3} — 3/3 red Spirit Bird with flying. • Max Elephant - {6} — 6/6 red and white Spirit Elephant with trample.

card.name: Rabbit Escape!
card.text: Kicker {4} Prevent all damage that would be dealt to you and creatures you control this turn. If this spell was kicked, for each 1 damage prevented this way, create a 1/1 white Spirit Rabbit creature token.

card.name: Mai, Secret Shot
card.text: Vigilance, reach {2}{r}: Mai deals 1 damage to any target. Technique — {1}, {t}: Add {r}{r}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. (Whenever Mai attacks, you can activate her technique once for no cost.)

card.name: Sol Ring
card.text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.

card.name: Nobara, Unswayed
card.text: First strike Whenever a source deals damage to one or more creatures a player controls, that source deals damage to that player equal to the greatest damage dealt to a creature this way.

card.name: Choso, Sanguine Supernova
card.text: Creatures you control deal noncombat damage as though they had wither. Technique - {1}{r}{b}, {t}: Create a Blood token. When you do, Choso deals 1 damage to each of up to X targets, where X is the number of Bloods you control. (Whenever Choso attacks, you may activate his technique once for no cost.)

card.name: Cataclysmic Assault
card.text: Cursed - This spell costs {2} less to cast as long as there are four or more Sorcerer cards in your graveyard. Destroy target permanent. Mill one card.

card.name: Kusakabe, The Evening Moon
card.text: Vigilance, first strike Technique - {1}, Exile Kusakabe: Sorcerers you control get +1/+1 and gain indestructible and hexproof until end of turn. (Whenever Kusakabe attacks, you can activate his technique once without paying its costs.)

card.name: Yuji Itadori, Sukuna’s Vessel
card.text: First strike, haste Technique - {1}{b}: Put a +1/+1 counter and a time counter on Yuji. If he isn't attacking, transform him. (Whenever Yuji attacks, you can activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Nobara, Straw-Doll Slayer
card.text: Technique — {3}{b}: Put a -1/-1 counter on target creature. (Whenever Nobara attacks, you may activate her technique once for free.) Whenever you put one or more -1/-1 counters on a creature, Nobara deals 1 damage to its controller.

card.name: All-Out Assault
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 and have deathtouch. When this enchantment enters, if it's your main phase, there is an additional combat phase after this phase followed by an additional main phase. When you next attack this turn, untap each creature you control.

card.name: Malevolent Shrine
card.text: (As this enters, put all other worlds into their owners' graveyards.) Cumulative upkeep — Pay {r} and 2 life. At the beginning of your upkeep, for each age counter on Malevolent Shrine, it deals 2 damage to each creature you don't control. When Malevolent Shrine leaves the battlefield, destroy up to one target artifact.

card.name: Yuji, Jujutsu Sorcerer
card.text: Haste Technique — {1}{wr}: Yuji gets +1/+0 and gains double strike and until end of turn. (Whenever this creature attacks, you can activate its technique once for free.)

card.name: Kindred Dominance
card.text: Choose a creature type. Destroy all creatures that aren't of the chosen type.

card.name: Kento Nanami, Rational Slayer
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Nanami deals damage to a creature, exile that creature if the damage equaled half its toughness rounded down. Technique - {1}: Nanami gets -1/+1 or +1/-1 until end of turn. (Whenever Nanami attacks, you may activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Ruinous Ultimatum
card.text: Destroy all nonland permanents your opponents control.

card.name: Collective Inferno
card.text: Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.) As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type. Double all damage that sources you control of the chosen type would deal.

card.name: Ryomen Sukuna, History Reborn
card.text: Menace, trample, indestructible Vanishing (At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from Sukuna. When the last is removed, sacrifice him.) If Sukuna would be sacrificed, instead transform him.

card.name: Sorcerer’s Command
card.text: Cursed - When you cast this spell, if there are four or more Sorcerer cards in your graveyard, copy this spell. You may choose new targets for the copy. Choose up to two — • Destroy target artifact. • This spell deals 2 damage to any target. • Return target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Toge Inumaki, The Silencer
card.text: Technique - {1}{w}: Target creature can't attack or block this turn. If it's your turn, its controller can't cast spells or activate abilities of nonlands this turn. (Whenever Toge attacks, you may activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Mechamaru, Remote Student
card.text: Modular X (Mechamaru enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. When he dies, you may put his +1/+1 counters on target artifact creature.) Fabricate 1 (When Mechamaru enters the battlefield, you may put a +1/+1 counter on him. If you don't, create a 1/1 colorless Servo artifact creature token.)

card.name: Kenjaku’s Edict
card.text: Each player sacrifices two creatures. Cursed - If there are four or more Sorcerer cards in your graveyard, instead each opponent sacrifices half the creatures they control of their choice, rounded up.

card.name: Fireball
card.text: This spell costs {1} more to cast for each target beyond the first. Fireball deals X damage divided evenly, rounded down, among any number of targets.

card.name: Resonant Punishment
card.text: Lifelink This spell deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. Cursed - If there are four or more Sorcerer cards in your graveyard, this spell also deals 6 damage to that permanent's controller.

card.name: Path to Exile
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Haruta, Miraculously Saved
card.text: Haruta enters with six shield counters on him. Haruta attacks each combat if able. Technique - {2}{r}: Haruta fights target creature you don't control. (Whenever Haruta attacks, you may activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Hanami’s Intervention
card.text: Prevent all damage that would be dealt to you this turn. Spirits, Elementals, and lands you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Cursed - If a Sorcerer or Spirit card was put into your graveyard this turn, those permanents also gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Merciless Destruction
card.text: Cursed - Choose up to two. If there are four or more Sorcerer cards in your graveyard, you may choose the same mode more than once — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • This spell deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Domain Amplification
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has protection from creatures, sorceries, and non-Aura enchantments.

card.name: Patchwork Banner
card.text: As this artifact enters, choose a creature type. Creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Simple Domain: Evening Moon
card.text: (As this enters, put all other worlds into their owners' graveyards.) Enchant creature Enchanted creature has indestructible. {1}{w}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Split-Second Domain
card.text: Search your library for a world card, exile it, then shuffle. For as long as that card remains exiled, you may cast it as though it had flash. If you do, it gains “When this permanent enters, its controller sacrifices it.”

card.name: Junpei Yoshino, Cursed Sorcerer
card.text: When Junpei enters, create a 1/4 black Spirit Jellyfish creature token with flying and deathtouch.

card.name: Disaster Radius
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, reveal a creature card from your hand. Disaster Radius deals X damage to each creature your opponents control, where X is the revealed card's mana value.

card.name: Shoko leiri, Medic
card.text: Zengin must have deleted the save file for this one. Go yell at him, but not too loud; it was definitely an accident.

card.name: Simple Domain
card.text: (As this enters, put all other worlds into their owners' graveyards.) Flash When ~ enters, you may pay {1}{u}. If you do, counter target spell, activated ability, or triggered ability. (Mana abilities can't be targeted.)

card.name: Satoru Gojo, Limitless
card.text: Technique — {1}{u}{u}, {t}: Target creature has base power and toughness 1/1 until end of turn. (Whenever Gojo attacks, you can activate one of his techniques once without paying its costs.) Technique — {1}{r}{r}: Gojo deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Mahito, Humanity’s Bane
card.text: Deathtouch, menace Technique - Sacrifice a creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on Mahito. (Whenever Mahito attacks, you may activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Akari Nitta, Assistant Manager
card.text: Activated abilities of creatures you control cost {2} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana.

card.name: Mimiko, Dollslayer
card.text: Technique - {2}{w}: Create an artifact token with target creature's name. (Whenever Mimiko attacks, you may activate her technique once for free.) {b}{b}, {t}, Sacrifice a token: Destroy each creature with the same name as the sacrificed token. Partner with Nanako, Picture Perfect

card.name: Mahito, Soul Shaper
card.text: {pu}{b}: Regenerate Mahito. (The next time he would be destroyed this turn, instead tap him, remove him from combat, and heal all damage on him. {pu} can be paid with either {u} or 2 life.) Whenever Mahito deals combat damage to a creature, you gain control of it. Regenerate it. It becomes a Mutant with base power and toughness 1/1 and loses all abilities.

card.name: Yuta, Breaker of Sendai
card.text: If a creature would die, exile it instead. Technique - {3}{b}{b}{b}: Choose a card exiled with Yuta. Until end of turn, he has its activated abilities. You may activate one of them without paying its costs. (Activate it only once, as this ability resolves. Whenever Yuta attacks, you may activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Mahoraga, The Eight-Handled Sword
card.text: Zengin must have deleted the save file for this one. Go yell at him, but not too loud; it was definitely an accident.

card.name: Jogo, Volcanic Fury
card.text: Technique - {3}{r}, {t}: Jogo deals damage equal to his power divided evenly among any two targets. (Whenever Jogo attacks, you can activate his technique once for free.) Whenever Jogo attacks, he gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each attacking creature. If three or more Spirits are attacking, Jogo gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Kurourushi, Cursed Roach
card.text: Haste, trample Technique - {3}{b}{g}: Create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token with flying. Populate. (Whenever Kurourushi attacks, you may activate his technique once for free.) {b}{g}, Sacrifice four Insects: Return Kurourushi from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Fire Covenant
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life. Fire Covenant deals X damage divided as you choose among any number of target creatures.

card.name: Megumi, Shikigami Master
card.text: Technique — {3}{g}: Create three 1/1 green Spirit Frog creature tokens with reach. (Whenever Megumi attacks, you can activate one of his techniques once for free.) Technique — {3}{b}: Create two 2/2 black and white Spirit Dog creature tokens. Technique — {3}{r}: Create a 3/3 red Spirit Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: The Exception
card.text: Enchant creature {u}: Enchanted creature phases out.

card.name: Todo of the Boogie Woogie
card.text: Vigilance Technique — {g}{r}{u}: Return target creature to its owner's hand. (Whenever Todo attacks, you can activate his technique once for free.)

card.name: Stitch in the Head
card.text: Cursed - If there are four or more Sorcerer cards in your graveyard, each player mills four cards. Put a creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. You lose life equal to that card's mana value.

card.name: Bloodline Pretender
card.text: Changeling (This card is every creature type.) As this creature enters, choose a creature type. Whenever another creature you control of the chosen type enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Kiyotaka Ijichi, Assistant Manager
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacking causes a triggered ability of that creature to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time. (Technique abilities' free activation is a triggered ability.)

card.name: Chaos Warp
card.text: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into their library, then reveals the top card of their library. If it's a permanent card, they put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Isshin, Two Heavens as One (Maki, Zen’in Executioner)
card.text: If a creature attacking causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Rabbit_Escape! Alt
card.text: Kicker {4} Prevent all damage that would be dealt to you and creatures you control this turn. If this spell was kicked, for each 1 damage prevented this way, create a 1/1 white Spirit Rabbit creature token.

card.name: Shining Sea of Branches
card.text: (As this enters, put all other worlds into their owners' graveyards.) Whenever you tap a basic land for mana, add one mana of any color. When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, untap all lands you control.

card.name: Spirit Jellyfish
card.text: Flying, deathtouch
